name: insurancexdate
description: TypeScript MCP server for the InsuranceXDate workers'-comp prospect database and SERFF rate-filing API. 7 tools: search, match, filter, company_details, talkpoints, serff_search, serff_filing.
long_description: Wraps the InsuranceXDate REST API and MCP endpoints. Works with any MCP client (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Continue, Zed, Cline, custom). Implements parameter translation between upstream MCP and REST schemas, URL decoding for company UIDs returned by REST search and consumed by MCP detail lookups, HTTP timeout via AbortSignal, response.ok validation with isError MCP responses on failures, structuredContent on search results for typed LLM reasoning, schema validation via zod (state codes, dates, premium / mod / employee bands, addloptions and policyoptions enums), and an optional XDATE_DISABLE_PAID env flag for defense-in-depth on paid endpoints. Built on @modelcontextprotocol/sdk v1.29 and Node 20+. This .mcpb bundle targets Claude Desktop's one-click install path; the same server source works on any MCP client via stdio. Unofficial third-party client; not affiliated with InsuranceXDate.

api_key.title: InsuranceXDate API Key
api_key.description: Your InsuranceXDate API key from https://www.insurancexdate.com/settings.php#api (API/MCP tab). Stored in your OS keychain (Windows Credential Manager / macOS Keychain).

tools.name: search
tools.description: Free workers' comp prospect search. v1.1.3 schema covers all upstream filter params: state/dates/class/sic/industry/county/carrier/agent/peo lists, premium/mod/employee ranges, policyoptions (AR/MULTISTATE/PEO), addloptions (BENEFITS/DOT/NPO/OSHA/PEO)

tools.name: match
tools.description: Free find-by-name endpoint via /api2/Match. Look up a business by name+state/fein/phone. Returns UID. Subject to subscription tier

tools.name: filter
tools.description: Free filter-value lookup (carriers, classes, SIC, counties, agents, peolist, policyoptions, addloptions)

tools.name: company_details
tools.description: Paid ($0.25): full company details by UID

tools.name: talkpoints
tools.description: Paid ($0.10): prospecting talking points by UID

tools.name: serff_search
tools.description: Paid ($0.05): SERFF rate-filing search with server-side filters (carrier_naic, state, insurance_type, severity)
